sentence: 她的经纪人为她安排了几场演出。
pinyin: Tā de jīngjìrén wèi tā ānpáile jǐ chǎng yǎnchū.
english: Her agent arranged several performances for her.

meaning: 1. to force into exile; 2. to be exiled; 3. in exile
sentence: 他在海外流亡了十多年。
pinyin: Tā zài hǎiwài liúwángle shí duō nián.
english: He lived in exile abroad for more than ten years.

sentence: 这个文件被设置成了只读模式。
pinyin: Zhège wénjiàn bèi shèzhì chéngle zhǐdú móshì.
english: This file has been set to read-only mode.

meaning: 1. collection of documents; 2. library; 3. book series; 4. sequence of
sentence: 图书馆的古籍文库对外开放了。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn de gǔjí wénkù duìwài kāifàngle.
english: The library's rare book collection has been opened to the public.

sentence: 政府每十年进行一次人口普查。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ měi shí nián jìnxíng yī cì rénkǒu pǔchá.
english: The government conducts a census every ten years.

sentence: 这家餐厅的服务质量很高。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng de fúwù zhìliàng hěn gāo.
english: The quality of service at this restaurant is very high.

sentence: 候车室里摆着几份书报供旅客阅读。
pinyin: Hòu chē shì lǐ bǎi zhe jǐ fèn shū bào gōng lǚ kè yuè dú.
english: The waiting room has some books and newspapers for passengers to read.

meaning: to turn a hand over; to put one's hand behind one's back; fig. easily
sentence: 他反手就接住了从背后飞来的球。
pinyin: Tā fǎn shǒu jiù jiē zhù le cóng bèi hòu fēi lái de qiú.
english: He turned his hand and caught the ball that came flying from behind.

sentence: 装修费是这次预算中最大的大项。
pinyin: Zhuāng xiū fèi shì zhè cì yù suàn zhōng zuì dà de dà xiàng.
english: Renovation costs are the biggest main item in this budget.

sentence: 公司明天上午召开用户座谈会。
pinyin: Gōngsī míngtiān shàngwǔ zhàokāi yònghù zuòtánhuì.
english: The company is holding a user symposium tomorrow morning.

sentence: 博物馆里展出了一块恐龙化石。
pinyin: Bówùguǎn lǐ zhǎnchūle yī kuài kǒnglóng huàshí.
english: A dinosaur fossil is on display at the museum.

sentence: 运动员夺冠后，全场观众起立鼓掌。
pinyin: Yùndòngyuán duó guàn hòu, quán chǎng guānzhòng qǐlì gǔzhǎng.
english: After the athlete won the championship, the whole audience rose to their feet and applauded.

meaning: 1. tea; 2. tea leaves; 3. CL:盒[hé],罐[guàn],包[bāo],片[piàn]
sentence: 他从云南带回来一些好茶叶。
pinyin: Tā cóng Yúnnán dài huí lái yīxiē hǎo cháyè.
english: He brought back some good tea leaves from Yunnan.

sentence: 他在网上挣钱养家。
pinyin: Tā zài wǎngshàng zhèngqián yǎngjiā.
english: He earns money online to support his family.

sentence: 全国掀起了学习编程的热潮。
pinyin: Quánguó xiān qǐ le xuéxí biānchéng de rècháo.
english: A wave of enthusiasm for learning programming has swept the country.

meaning: 1. to assume; 2. to suppose; 3. supposed; 4. so-called; 5. assumption;
sentence: 假定明天下雨，我们就改在室内开会。
pinyin: Jiǎ dìng míngtiān xià yǔ, wǒmen jiù gǎi zài shìnèi kāihuì.
english: Assuming it rains tomorrow, we'll move the meeting indoors.

sentence: 这部电影上映一周票房就破了纪录。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng shàngyìng yī zhōu piàofáng jiù pò le jìlù.
english: This movie broke box office records within one week of release.

sentence: 这台打印机可以联网共享使用。
pinyin: Zhè tái dǎ yìn jī kě yǐ lián wǎng gòng xiǎng shǐ yòng.
english: This printer can be connected to the network for shared use.

sentence: 地铁里有专门供残疾人使用的通道。
pinyin: Dì tiě lǐ yǒu zhuān mén gōng cán jí rén shǐ yòng de tōng dào.
english: The subway has dedicated passageways for people with disabilities.

meaning: 1. cooperative; 2. workers' or agricultural producers' coope
sentence: 村里成立了一个农业合作社。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ chénglì le yī gè nóngyè hézuòshè.
english: An agricultural cooperative was set up in the village.

meaning: to manage wealth; to manage finances; money management
sentence: 她学会了理财，每月都有存款。
pinyin: Tā xuéhuì le lǐcái, měi yuè dōu yǒu cúnkuǎn.
english: She learned to manage her finances and saves money every month.

meaning: to relieve disaster; to help disaster victims
sentence: 洪水过后，志愿者赶来救灾。
pinyin: Hóngshuǐ guòhòu, zhìyuànzhě gǎnlái jiùzāi.
english: After the flood, volunteers rushed in to provide disaster relief.

sentence: 超市里的消费品种类很丰富。
pinyin: Chāoshì lǐ de xiāofèipǐn zhǒnglèi hěn fēngfù.
english: The supermarket has a great variety of consumer goods.

sentence: 他在大学选修了现象学课程。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xuǎnxiū le xiànxiàngxué kèchéng.
english: He took a phenomenology course as an elective at university.

sentence: 沙漠里的骆驼能好几天不喝水。
pinyin: Shāmò lǐ de luòtuo néng hǎo jǐ tiān bù hē shuǐ.
english: Camels in the desert can go several days without drinking water.

sentence: 他们搬到了内陆城市生活。
pinyin: Tāmen bān dào le nèilù chéngshì shēnghuó.
english: They moved to an inland city to live.

sentence: 定期检查乳房对女性健康很重要。
pinyin: Dìngqī jiǎnchá rǔfáng duì nǚxìng jiànkāng hěn zhòngyào.
english: Regular breast examinations are very important for women's health.

sentence: 这个省的矿业非常发达。
pinyin: Zhège shěng de kuàngyè fēicháng fādá.
english: The mining industry in this province is very developed.

sentence: 孩子从小就应该积累科学知识。
pinyin: Háizi cóngxiǎo jiù yīnggāi jīlěi kēxué zhīshì.
english: Children should start accumulating scientific knowledge from a young age.

sentence: 驾驶员必须系好安全带。
pinyin: Jiàshǐyuán bìxū jì hǎo ānquándài.
english: The driver must fasten their seatbelt.

sentence: 他们正在为灾区募集捐款。
pinyin: Tāmen zhèngzài wèi zāiqū mùjí juānkuǎn.
english: They are collecting donations for the disaster area.

meaning: 1. to agitate for; 2. to enthusiastically promote
sentence: 他一直鼓吹健康饮食的好处。
pinyin: Tā yīzhí gǔchuī jiànkāng yǐnshí de hǎochù.
english: He has always enthusiastically promoted the benefits of healthy eating.

sentence: 奶奶每天早上都在院子里种花。
pinyin: Nǎinai měitiān zǎoshang dōu zài yuànzi lǐ zhòng huā.
english: Grandma grows flowers in the yard every morning.

sentence: 新闻报道了一枚飞弹被拦截。
pinyin: Xīnwén bàodào le yī méi fēidàn bèi lánjié.
english: The news reported that a missile was intercepted.

meaning: 1. (lit.) to fix one's gaze on; 2. (fig.) to show interest in; 3.
sentence: 这款手机很受年轻人青睐。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī hěn shòu niánqīngrén qīnglài.
english: This smartphone is very popular among young people.

meaning: 1. to repatriate (e.g. prisoners of war); 2. to send back
sentence: 他们被遣返回了自己的国家。
pinyin: Tāmen bèi qiǎnfǎn huí le zìjǐ de guójiā.
english: They were repatriated back to their home country.

sentence: 他因为肺炎住院了一个星期。
pinyin: Tā yīnwèi fèiyán zhùyuàn le yī gè xīngqī.
english: He was hospitalized for a week because of pneumonia.

sentence: 这位分析师对市场走势很有见解。
pinyin: Zhè wèi fēnxīshī duì shìchǎng zǒushì hěn yǒu jiànjiě.
english: This analyst has keen insights into market trends.

sentence: 越来越多的家庭进入了中产阶级。
pinyin: Yuèláiyuè duō de jiātíng jìnrù le zhōngchǎn jiējí.
english: More and more families are entering the middle class.

sentence: 她的厨艺好得了不得，每道菜都超好吃。
pinyin: Tā de chú yì hǎo de liǎo bù dé, měi dào cài dōu chāo hǎo chī.
english: Her cooking skills are incredible — every dish is absolutely delicious.

meaning: erroneous variant of 彷彿|仿佛[fang3 fu2]
sentence: 听到这首歌，我彷佛回到了童年。
pinyin: Tīng dào zhè shǒu gē, wǒ páng fó huí dào le tóng nián.
english: Hearing this song, I felt as if I'd returned to my childhood.

meaning: to purchase (sth expensive, e.g. a house); to acquire (a company, a co
sentence: 他终于攒够钱，买下了那套房子。
pinyin: Tā zhōng yú zǎn gòu qián, mǎi xià le nà tào fáng zi.
english: He finally saved enough money to purchase that apartment.

sentence: 这件事由张经理经办，你找他就行。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì yóu Zhāng jīng lǐ jīng bàn, nǐ zhǎo tā jiù xíng.
english: This matter is being handled by Manager Zhang — just go find him.

sentence: 公司计划下半年推出新产品。
pinyin: Gōng sī jì huà xià bàn nián tuī chū xīn chǎn pǐn.
english: The company plans to launch a new product in the second half of the year.

sentence: 救援人员在现场设立了临时指挥部。
pinyin: Jiù yuán rén yuán zài xiàn chǎng shè lì le lín shí zhǐ huī bù.
english: Rescue workers set up a temporary command post at the scene.

meaning: to meet face to face; to meet in person
sentence: 他明天要去面见公司的总裁。
pinyin: Tā míng tiān yào qù miàn jiàn gōng sī de zǒng cái.
english: He is going to meet the company's president in person tomorrow.

meaning: 1. merger and acquisition (M and A); 2. acquisition; 3. to take over
sentence: 那家公司去年完成了一项重大并购。
pinyin: Nà jiā gōngsī qùnián wánchéngle yī xiàng zhòngdà bìnggòu.
english: That company completed a major merger and acquisition last year.

sentence: 修车的零件已经订好了。
pinyin: Xiū chē de língjiàn yǐjīng dìng hǎo le.
english: The parts needed to repair the car have already been ordered.

meaning: To refresh; To renovate, to refresh (computer window)
sentence: 她刷新了学校的百米跑步纪录。
pinyin: Tā shuāxīn le xuéxiào de bǎi mǐ pǎobù jìlù.
english: She broke the school's 100-meter running record.

sentence: 她历来都是班里成绩最好的学生。
pinyin: Tā lìlái dōu shì bān lǐ chéngjì zuì hǎo de xuésheng.
english: She has always been the top student in the class.
